name: io.github.nirholas/3D-AI-Agent-Avatar
description: 3D AI Agent Avatar — render any GLB, give it a Solana wallet, a voice, and pump.fun powers.

environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_RPC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Solana mainnet RPC endpoint. Defaults to https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com — bring your own (Helius / QuickNode / Triton) for production traffic.

environmentVariables.name: ETH_RPC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Ethereum mainnet RPC for ENS resolution. Optional — falls back to ethers' default public providers.

environmentVariables.name: HELIUS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional Helius API key — enables exact supply + DAS data in pump_snapshot.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Required for the speak tool (OpenAI TTS).

environmentVariables.name: REPLICATE_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Required for the generate_avatar tool (Replicate text/image-to-3D).

environmentVariables.name: REPLICATE_TEXT_TO_AVATAR_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Replicate version hash pinned for text-to-3D — recommended: latest tencent/hunyuan-3d-3.1.

environmentVariables.name: SOLANA_SECRET_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional default base58 Solana secret for wallet_send / pump_buy. Per-call secret args override this. Treat like cash.

environmentVariables.name: THREE_MINT
environmentVariables.description: Optional pump.fun mint address for $three so tools accept target="three" as shorthand.
